verses.text: Hezekiah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnihlenga pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnihlekua sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Abijah hi a, Zekhariah' tanu ahi hi
A pu David' hihnasa khempeuh bangin Topa' mitah a man gamta hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Hezekiah in Biakinn Biakna Omsak Kik

verses.text: Ama uk a kum khatna, a kha masa sungin amah in Topa' biakinn kongkhakte hongin tuate a puah hi
Amah in siampite leh Levi mite paipihin nisuahna lam mun awngah amaute khawmin
amaute kiangah, “Levi mite aw, ka thugen hong za un! Tuni-in nomau kisian'suah un la, na pu na pate uh Pasian, Topa' biakinn siangthosakin a ninsak thei na khempeuh siangtho mun panin nawnkhia un

Bang hang hiam cih leh i pute i pate citaklo a, Topa i Pasian' muhna-ah a sia gamta uh hi. Amaute in amah nusia-in, Topa i Pasian' muhna-ah a sia gamta uh hi. Amaute in amah nusia-in, Topa' ten'na panin a mai uh heikhia uh a, a nung uh ngat uh hi
Amaute in innliim kongkhakte zong khakin meivakte sumit uh a, siangtho munah paknamtui halna leh meihal biaknate Israel Pasian tungah bawllo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Judah leh Jerusalem tungah Topa' hehna hong tung a, note' mit mahmah tawh na muh uh mah bangin amah in amaute a cikzethuai, lamdangsakna, leh a dipkuathuai-in a bawl hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, hih thu hangin namsau-in i pu i pate puk uh a, i tapate, i tanute, leh i zite galmatin om uh hi
Tu-in a lauhuai a hehna eite tung pan a kiheikhiat theihna dingin Israel Pasian, Topa tawh thuciamna khat bawl ding ka lungsimah om hi
Ka tate aw, Topa in ama omna-ah a ding ding, ama na a sem ding, leh ama nasemte hi-in ama tungah paknamtui a hal dingin note hong teel khin ahih manin tu-in mawk om kei un,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Levi mite, Kohath' beh sung panin Amasai' tapa Mahath, leh Azariah' tapa Joel; Merari' beh sung panin Abdi' tapa Kish, leh Jehallelel' tapa Azariah; Gershon beh sung panin Zimmah' tapa Joah, leh Joah' tapa Eden
Elizafan' beh sung panin Shimri leh Jeuel; Asaf' beh sung panin Zekhariah leh Mattaniah
Heman' beh sung panin Jehiel leh Shimei; Jeduthun' beh sung panin Shemaiah leh Uzziel kipan uh hi
Amaute in a sanggamte uh khawmin amau kisian'suah uh a, Topa' genna tawh kumpipa' thupiak bangin Topa' biakinn a puahsiang dingin a tum uh hi

A puahsiang dingin Topa' biakinn sung tawngnungah a siampite lut uh a, Topa' biakinn sunga a muh uh a nin khempeuh Topa' biakinn tualah hong paikhiatpih uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite in la-in Kidron lui-ah puakhia uh hi

Kha masa a ni masa ni-in amaute in sian'suah ding kipan uh a, tua kha a ni giat ni-in Topa' innliimah amaute hong pai uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in ni giat sung Topa' biakinn sian'suah uh a, a kha masa a ni sawmleguk ni-in zo uh hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah kiangah amaute tumin, “ Topa' biakinn khempeuh, meihal biakna tau leh a nazatte khempeuh, leh Ompihna Anlum sabuai leh a nazatte khempeuh ka puahsiang khin uh hi
Kumpi Ahaz a cihtakloh laitakin ama uk sungin a paihkhiat nazat khempeuh a baihsa-in bawlin ka sian'suah uh hi. Topa' biakna tau mai-ah tu-in tuate om hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah tho baihin khuapi sung zaneite khawmin Topa' biakinn-ah a paito uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in kumpi gam leh biakinn leh Judah-a' dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in bawngtal sagih, tuutal sagih, tuuno sagih, leh keel sagih hong paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in Topa' biakna tau tungah tuate a pia dingin Aaron' suan siampite a sawl hi

Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a bawngtalte go uh a, siampite in a sisan la-in biakna tau tungah theh uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tuutalte go-in a sisan tawh biakna tau theh uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tuunote go-in a sisan tawh biakna tau theh uh hi
Tua ciangin khialhna hanga biakna ding keeltal sagihte kumpipa leh a kikhawmte kiangah hong kipaipih a, amaute in tuate tungah a khut uh nga hi

tua ciangin Israel khempeuh-a' dingin pumkhat suahna bawlna dingin siampite in go-in tuate' sisan tawh biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna a bawl uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel khempeuh-a' dingin meihal biakna leh khialhna hanga biakna a bawl ding uh kumpipa in thu pia hi

Tua ciangin amah in David leh kumpipa' thumupa Gad leh kamsang Nathan' thupiakna bangin Topa' biakinn sungah daltuahte, harp lasaknate, leh laia lasaknate tawh Levi mite a koih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua thupiakna pen kamsangte' tung tawnin Topa' kiang pan a hong pai ahi hi
David' lasaknate tawh Levi mite ding uh a, peengkulte tawh siampite ding uh hi

Tua ciangin biakna tau tungah meihal biakna a kipiakna ding Hezekiah in thu a pia hi. Meihal biakna a kipat ciangin Topa' tungah lasakna zong kipan a, Israel kumpi David' lasaknate in peengkulte pawm hi
A kikhawm khempeuh in Pasian bia-in, lasate in la sa uh a, peengkul tumte in peengkul tum uh hi. Meihal biakna a kiman mateng hihte khempeuh hih paisuak uh hi
Biakpiakna a kiman ciangin kumpipa leh amah tawh a om khempeuhte kunin Pasian a bia uh hi

Tua ciangin David' kammalte leh thumupa Asaf' kammalte zangin Topa' tungah phatna la a sakna dingun kumpipa Hezekiah leh uliante in Levi mite thu a pia uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in lungdamna tawh phatna late sa uh a, tua ciangin amaute kunin Pasian a bia uh hi

Tua ciangin Hezekiah in, “Tu-in Topa' tungah nomau mah na ki-ap khin uh hi. A nai-ah hong pai un la Topa' biakinn-ah biakpiaknate leh lungdam piaknate hong paipih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a kikhawmte in biakpiaknate leh lungdam piaknate hong paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin piaknopna lungsim a nei khempeuh in meihal biaknate hong paipih uh hi
A kikhawmte in a hong paipih meihal biakna a phazah bawngtal sawmsagih, tuutal za khat, leh tuuno za nih hi a, hihte khempeuh pen Topa' tungah meihal biakna khat ahi hi
A ki-ap biaknate bawngtal za guk leh tuu tul thum ahi hi

Ahih hangin siampite a mi tawmlua uh ahih manin meihal biaknate khempeuh a vun hawk khin zolo uh a, siampi dangte a kisian'suah ma sungteng, a sanggam uh Levi mite in nasep a kizawh mateng amaute huh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kisian'suahna thu-ah siampite sangin Levi mite ngentel zaw uh hi
Meihal biakna a tampite banah thunuama biakna thaute, leh meihal biakna-a' dingin leenggahzu tawh biaknate om hi. Tua bangin Topa' biakinn sungah nasepna ki-omsak kik hi
Pasian in mite-a' dingin a bawlsak thute hangin Hezekiah leh mi khempeuh lungdam uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu thakhatin hong piangvat hi.
